_scenario: SCENARIO 1: Meeting Prep — Margaret Chen quarterly review before year-end RMD
request_context: Q4 annual review. Margaret's first full year since husband passed. RMD deadline approaching 12/31. She mentioned interest in increasing charitable giving via DAF.

_scenario: SCENARIO 2: Rebalancing Proposal — Thornton portfolio drifted after equity rally
request_context: After the Q1 equity rally, US equities now ~62% of portfolio vs. 50% IPS target. Need to rebalance back to targets. Also have college funding milestone in 3 years — review fixed income ladder.

_scenario: SCENARIO 3: Investment Proposal — David Okafor private equity allocation
request_context: Presenting Blackstone Private Credit Fund (BCRED) as alternatives sleeve addition. David has expressed interest in increasing alternatives exposure from current 12% to IPS target 20%.
investment_idea: Blackstone Private Credit (BCRED) — private credit fund targeting 10-12% net returns. Accredited investor only. 5-year lockup. Monthly income distributions.

_scenario: SCENARIO 4: Client Communication — Martinez Trust inflation concerns letter
request_context: Trust beneficiaries have called twice asking about inflation impact on their portfolio. Want to draft a reassuring but honest letter explaining our positioning and what we're doing about it.
